NAME: b37
SOURCE: the 1000 Genomes Project Phase I and III, Broad Institute
KEYWORDS: GRCh37; 1000 Genomes; Broad; b37; reference FASTA
DESCRIPTION: GRCh37-compatible reference FASTA used across Broad Institute and 1000 Genomes workflows: chromosomes 1-22, X, Y, MT, plus GL/NC unlocalized and unplaced contigs (as in the distributed assembly19 package). Coordinate system matches the 1KG/b37 ecosystem used by many GWAS imputation and joint-calling pipelines.
